intentSynonyms: get a streams by game in twitch
look up a streams by game in twitch
fetch a single streams by game in twitch
view one specific streams by game in twitch
get streams by game in twitch
get live streams for a game or category in twitch
description: Get live streams for a specific game/category. Provide either the game name (e.g., "Just Chatting") or game ID. Returns streams sorted by viewer count.

first.description: Number of streams to return (default 10, max 25)
